description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. 16th-century based on the paleography and mention of Ottoman-era jadid coinage. On the recto the name Yiṣḥaq Mar Ḥayyīm is mentioned in connection with a qadi. For the surname Mar Ḥayyīm, see also: T-S Ar.30.141 (PGPID 20277); ENA NS 53.21 (PGPID 11382). The verso mentions the name Yosef Medina. MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
